prompt: A polished anime-style corporate booth illustration with cel shading and controlled highlights, showing a young adult female PR representative standing three-quarters view in a futuristic industrial exhibition space lit with cool purple and blue accent lighting. Her face is obscured by a centered rectangular blur block. She has very long straight dark hair with subtle purple undertones, flowing past her waist, and wears geometric dangling earrings. Her outfit is a sleek black business suit with white piping along the lapels, a dark inner shirt, a fitted pencil skirt, a belt, and a visible lanyard with ID card. On her left arm she wears a white armband printed with the company logo and the words OHNO HEAVY INDUSTRIES. In one arm she holds a black presentation folder with the same logo and company name, and with her other hand she gestures open-palmed toward the booth displays as if introducing the company. The booth branding is prominent: a large illuminated wall sign in the upper left with the logo, the Japanese company name "大野重工業株式会社", the English name "OHNO HEAVY INDUSTRIES", and the slogan "BUILDING THE FUTURE. SUPPORTING THE WORLD." Below it is a large poster panel showing an industrial refinery skyline at dusk with Japanese copy reading "技術で支え、未来を創る。" and smaller text beneath. In the lower left foreground, place a standing nameplate sign with the same logo and company name, plus the department line "広報部 | PR DIVISION" and the representative name "雲居 モヤ" with the romanization "KUMOI MOYA". Also show her hanging ID badge with the logo and small text suggesting PR staff credentials. The exhibition floor includes 3 visible industrial display elements: a white robotic construction machine model on a pedestal at left, a smaller mechanical display in the mid-background, and a large white humanoid or armored industrial mech figure on the right background. Use a high-end convention or trade-show setting with glossy reflective surfaces, glass panels, sharp perspective lines, and branded panels throughout. Composition should be vertical, waist-up to near full-body framing, with the character dominating the right-center and the company signage clearly readable on the left. Emphasize refined anime character design, professional corporate ambassador energy, futuristic heavy-industry branding, purple ambient glow, and clean cel-shaded rendering rather than overly sparkly effects.
